captain_cosmos.welcome: Welcome aboard, Space Speller! I'm Captain Cosmos!
captain_cosmos.good_job: Excellent spelling! You're a star traveler!
captain_cosmos.try_again: No worries, mistakes help us learn. Try again!
captain_cosmos.streak_3: Amazing! You're on a roll with 3 in a row!
captain_cosmos.streak_5: Incredible! 5 perfect words! You've discovered a new planet!
captain_cosmos.planet_complete: Planet cleared! Ready for the next adventure?
captain_cosmos.hint_1: Here's a hint: The word has {count} letters.
captain_cosmos.encouragement_1: You can do it! Keep trying!
captain_cosmos.tutorial_start: Let me show you how to play!
captain_cosmos.tutorial_end: Now you're ready to explore the galaxy!

system.level_complete: Planet Complete! 5 out of 5 words mastered!
system.game_over: Great game! See you next time!
system.streak_bonus: Streak Bonus! {count} words in a row!

metadata.description: Caption texts for Word Quest accessibility features
